title: Run physical T-Deck LoRa TX/RX smoke
description: Validate the LilyGO T-Deck SX1262 path on real hardware after a board is visible for flashing/log capture. Capture exact board revision, flash command, boot log, radio init log, TX smoke evidence, and RX or peer exchange with a known-good device or simulator bridge. Current blocker: no Espressif/T-Deck USB device is visible on the local host; only /dev/cu.Bluetooth-Incoming-Port, /dev/cu.debug-console, /dev/cu.usbserial-A704ESXG, and /dev/cu.wlan-debug were present during project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.5 work.
